messages.content:
请翻译以下文段，要求符合学术论文的语言风格：3. 研究设计
3.1 样本选择与数据来源
本文选取样本区间为2011年至2020年的中国沪深A股市场上市公司为研究对象，研究企业ESG表现对合作创新产出的影响。为提高数据科学性，对原始样本按照以下条件进行筛选：（1）因金融、保险行业业务和财务报表标准的特殊性，剔除了归属于该行业的上市公司；（2）剔除相关数据未披露或缺失的上市公司；（3）剔除期间被ST和PT的上市公司。最终获得1115个企业8274个样本观测值。为了消除极端值的影响，本文对所有连续变量进行了上下1%的缩尾处理（Winsorize）。
本文所用公司财务和产权性质相关数据均来自于国泰安（CSMAR）数据库，专利申请和媒体报道数据来自中国研究数据服务平台（CNRDS），上市公司ESG评级数据来自于彭博（Bloomberg）终端彭博ESG评级。

3. Research Design
3.1 Sample Selection and Data Source

This study focuses on the impact of corporate ESG performance on collaborative innovation output by selecting a sample of Chinese A-share listed companies from the period of 2011 to 2020. To ensure the scientific validity of the data, the original sample was subjected to the following screening criteria: (1) companies belonging to the financial and insurance industries or subject to their specific financial reporting standards were removed; (2) listed companies with incomplete or missing data were removed; (3) companies that became ST or PT during the period were removed. Ultimately, a total of 1115 companies and 8274 observations were obtained. To mitigate the effects of outliers, we Winsorized all continuous variables at the top and bottom 1%.

The financial and property-related data used in this study were obtained from the Guotai-An (CSMAR) database, while patent application and media reporting data were sourced from the China National Research Data Service (CNRDS), and ESG rating data for listed companies were obtained from Bloomberg's terminal ESG rating system.

请翻译以下文段，要求符合学术论文的语言风格：3.2 变量定义
3.2.1 被解释变量
被解释变量是合作创新产出数量和合作创新产出质量。部分研究基于调查问卷测度合作创新产出水平，然而调查问卷数据的客观性不能得到很好的保证，样本量受限且可获得性较差。联合申请的专利是指上市公司与其他实体联合申请的专利，Hong和Su（2013）、Liu（2022）、Bai and Lee（2023）等学者以联合专利申请测度合作创新产出水平，Brockman等（2018）基于联合专利的共同所有权衡量合作创新。结合数据可获得性的实际情况，本文借鉴以上学者的测量方法，以上市公司当年联合申请的专利总数量加1取自然对数的值来衡量合作创新产出数量，合作创新产出数量（Patent）=ln (联合申请的专利数量+1)。本文借鉴Zhang et al.（2017）、Lee & Zheng（2016）对企业创新质量的测量方法，以上市公司当年联合申请的发明专利总数量加1取自然对数的值来衡量合作创新产出质量，合作创新产出质量（Patenti）=ln (联合申请的发明专利数量+1)。

3.2 Variable Definitions
3.2.1 Dependent Variables

The dependent variables in this study are the quantity and quality of collaborative innovation output. While some studies have measured the level of collaborative innovation output through survey questionnaires, the objectivity and availability of such data are limited. Therefore, this study measures collaborative innovation output by using joint patent applications as a proxy. Specifically, we borrow the measurement methods of Hong and Su (2013), Liu (2022), Bai and Lee (2023), and others, who have used joint patent applications to measure collaborative innovation output. Brockman et al. (2018) have also measured collaborative innovation through the joint ownership of patents. In view of the actual availability of data, we define the quantity of collaborative innovation output as the natural logarithm of the total number of joint patent applications filed by the listed company and other entities, plus one, denoted as Patent = ln (Number of Joint Patent Applications + 1). Similarly, we measure the quality of collaborative innovation output by using the natural logarithm of the total number of joint invention patents filed by the listed company and other entities, plus one, denoted as Patenti = ln (Number of Joint Invention Patents + 1). We adopt the measurement method of Zhang et al. (2017) and Lee & Zheng (2016) to evaluate the quality of innovation output.

请翻译以下文段，要求符合学术论文的语言风格：联合申请的专利是指上市公司与其他实体联合申请的专利，Hong和Su（2013）、Liu（2022）、Bai and Lee（2023）等学者以联合专利申请测度合作创新产出水平，Brockman等（2018）基于联合专利的共同所有权衡量合作创新。结合数据可获得性的实际情况，本文借鉴以上学者的测量方法，以上市公司当年联合申请的专利总数量加1取自然对数的值来衡量合作创新产出数量，合作创新产出数量（Patent）=ln (联合申请的专利数量+1)。本文借鉴Zhang et al.（2017）、Lee & Zheng（2016）对企业创新质量的测量方法，以上市公司当年联合申请的发明专利总数量加1取自然对数的值来衡量合作创新产出质量，合作创新产出质量（Patenti）=ln (联合申请的发明专利数量+1)。

Joint patent applications refer to patents that are filed by the listed company and other entities in collaboration. Scholars such as Hong and Su (2013), Liu (2022), Bai and Lee (2023), and others have used joint patent applications as a measure of the level of collaborative innovation output, while Brockman et al. (2018) have measured collaborative innovation through the joint ownership of patents. Taking into account the availability of data, this study adopts the measurement methods of the aforementioned scholars and defines the quantity of collaborative innovation output as the natural logarithm of the total number of joint patent applications filed by the listed company and other entities in a given year, plus one, denoted as Patent = ln (Number of Joint Patent Applications + 1). Similarly, we measure the quality of collaborative innovation output by using the natural logarithm of the total number of joint invention patents filed by the listed company and other entities in a given year, plus one, denoted as Patenti = ln (Number of Joint Invention Patents + 1). We adopt the measurement method of Zhang et al. (2017) and Lee & Zheng (2016) to evaluate the quality of innovation output.

请翻译以下文段，要求符合学术论文的语言风格：3.2.2 解释变量
解释变量是企业ESG表现。随着ESG理念在全球的兴起，国内外多家评级机构逐步开始建立ESG评级体系。国际上以彭博（Bloomberg）、明晟（MSCI）、富时罗素（FTSE Russell）、道琼斯（DJSI）、碳信息披露项目（CDP）、Sustainalytics等机构的ESG评级体系最具影响力，中国国内主流评级体系有商道融绿ESG评级、华证ESG评级、和讯ESG评级、社会价值投资联盟ESG评级等。从投资机构对数据的使用情况来看，国内评级体系的接受度较低，主要原因是国内ESG理念兴起较晚，数据质量和评价方法尚不成熟。还有部分研究使用自建指标开展研究，但自建指标具有主观性，数据尚不完整。本文采用发展较为成熟的彭博公司提供的上市公司ESG表现评分。
彭博ESG评级方法汇集了上市公司社会责任报告、年度报告、可持续发展信息、金融基本面数据等多种数据源，以及团队直接要求公司配合的彭博专有调查，形成了最优指标和完全透明、参数化、基于规则的评分框架。彭博ESG评价体系可细分为环境表现、社会责任、公司治理三种类型，涵盖21个二级指标、122个三级指标，还提供环境表现、社会责任、公司治理各个维度的数据评分。此外，彭博终端在金融业得到了广泛应用，许多研究在分析中使用了彭博ESG数据。该体系具体内容如表1所示。

3.2.2 Independent Variables

The independent variable in this study is corporate ESG performance. With the rise of the ESG concept worldwide, many rating agencies at home and abroad have gradually established ESG rating systems. The ESG rating systems of institutions such as Bloomberg, MSCI, FTSE Russell, DJSI, CDP, and Sustainalytics are the most influential internationally, while the mainstream ESG rating systems in China include the Sustainalytics ESG rating, the Huazheng ESG rating, the Hexun ESG rating, and the Social Value Investment Alliance ESG rating. However, the acceptance of domestic ESG rating systems is relatively low among investment institutions due to the relatively late emergence of the ESG concept in China and the lack of maturity in data quality and evaluation methods. Some studies have used self-constructed indicators for research, but such indicators are subjective and the data are not complete. Therefore, this study uses the ESG performance rating provided by Bloomberg, a more mature and developed rating agency.

The Bloomberg ESG rating methodology combines various data sources including corporate social responsibility reports, annual reports, sustainability information, financial fundamentals, and proprietary surveys commissioned directly from the company, to form an optimal set of indicators and a completely transparent, parameterized, rule-based scoring framework. The Bloomberg ESG rating system can be classified into three types: environmental performance, social responsibility, and corporate governance. It covers 21 secondary indicators, 122 tertiary indicators, and provides data scores for each dimension of environmental performance, social responsibility, and corporate governance. In addition, the Bloomberg terminal has been widely used in the financial industry, and many studies have used Bloomberg ESG data in their analysis. Table 1 below shows the specific content of this rating system.

请翻译以下文段，要求符合学术论文的语言风格：3.2.3 控制变量
本文借鉴Zhang et al.（2017）、Zhu et al.（2018）、Yu et al.（2016）、Yi et al.（2015）等学者的研究，选取资产收益率（ROA）、托宾Q（TBQ）、控股股东持股比例（Consh）、企业规模（Size）、企业年龄（Age）、产权性质（SOE）为控制变量，同时加入年份、行业虚拟变量以控制时间、行业效应。
3.2.4 分组变量
（1）行业特征。针对行业特征异质性影响的假设，本文根据中华人民共和国生态环境部（原中华人民共和国环境保护部）印发的《关于印发＜上市公司环保核查行业分类管理名录＞的通知》，并借鉴Liu A et al.（2015）、Liu B（2016）、Pan et al.（2019）的做法，将煤炭开采和洗选业、石油和天然气开采业、黑色金属矿采选业、有色金属矿采选业、纺织业等15个行业定义为重污染行业，并根据中国证券监督管理委员会发布的《上市公司行业分类指引》确定重污染行业的代码。将重污染企业赋值为1，非重污染企业赋值为0。具体行业名称和代码的对应关系如表2所示。

3.2.3 Control Variables

This study adopts the research of scholars such as Zhang et al. (2017), Zhu et al. (2018), Yu et al. (2016), and Yi et al. (2015) and selects the following control variables: Return on Assets (ROA), Tobin's Q (TBQ), controlling shareholder ownership ratio (Consh), firm size (Size), firm age (Age), and property rights nature (SOE). In addition, dummy variables for years and industries are included to control for time and industry effects.


3.2.4 Grouping Variables

(1) Industry characteristics. To address the hypothesis that industry characteristics may affect the results, this study defines 15 industries, such as coal mining and washing, petroleum and natural gas extraction, black metal ore mining and selection, non-ferrous metal ore mining and selection, and textile manufacturing, as heavy pollution industries based on the "List of Classifications for Environmental Protection Inspections of Listed Companies" issued by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment of the People's Republic of China, and following the practices of Liu A et al. (2015), Liu B (2016), Pan et al. (2019), etc. The codes for these heavy pollution industries were determined based on the "Guideline for Industry Classification of Listed Companies" published by the China Securities Regulatory Commission. Heavy polluting enterprises are assigned a value of 1 and non-heavy polluting enterprises are assigned a value of 0. The corresponding relationship between the specific industry names and codes is shown in Table 2.
